- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

      React application with Vite and Tailwind CSS

      Created React + Vite project with npm scaffolding

  - Updated src/index.css with Tailwind directives

  - Created postcss.config.mjs configuration

      No extensions needed for this basic setup

- [x] Compile the Project
      Dependencies installed via npm during scaffolding

- [x] Create and Run Task
      Dev server is configured in package.json scripts

- [x] Launch the Project
      Run `npm run dev` to start the development server at http://localhost:5173/
